methodology.description: Transparent weighted feature scorecard. Feature weights are documented above. No ML black-box — fully interpretable.

output_payload.note: DECISION-SUPPORT DRAFT — probability scores are indicative band estimates from a weighted categorical scorecard. Not a machine-learning model. Feature weights are approximate; calibrate against your firm's actual fail history. No PII — all features are categorical/band-level.
